query: SELECT CONCAT(id, '|', IFNULL(LEFT(mediaUrl, 80), 'NULL'), '|', IFNULL(media_mime_type, 'NULL'), '|', IFNULL(media_file_name, 'NULL')) as info FROM messages WHERE messageType IN ('imageMessage', 'image') AND mediaUrl IS NOT NULL AND mediaUrl != '' AND mediaUrl NOT LIKE '%whatsapp.net%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT CONCAT(id, '|', IFNULL(LEFT(mediaUrl, 80), 'NULL'), '|', IFNULL(media_mime_type, 'NULL'), '|', IFNULL(media_file_name, 'NULL')) as info FROM messages WHERE messageType IN ('imageMessage', 'image') AND mediaUrl IS NOT NULL AND mediaUrl != '' AND mediaUrl NOT LIKE '%whatsapp.net%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5
